title: slug
description: A short, meaningful kebab-case slug for the proposal, named by the LLM from the idea (NOT a raw sentence). Uniqueness is enforced deterministically downstream (design_workspace.py), but the namer should still avoid obviously-taken names.

slug.description: 2-5 word kebab-case slug capturing the essence of the proposal, in the style of an existing docs/proposals/<slug>.md filename.
